name: Meeting House Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Pounds Unpeeled waxy boiling Potatoes -- scrubbed
2 Tablespoons White wine or apple juice
1/4 Cup Shallots or onion, finely chopped
1/4 Cup Green or sweet red pepper, finely chopped
2 Tablespoons Sweet or dill pickle relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in water to cover until tender, about 30 minutes.
2. Drain and cool thoroughly.
3. Peel potatoes and cut into 1-inch cubes.
4. Place in mixing bowl.
5. Whisk olive oil with lemon juice, white wine, mustard, and salt. Pour over potatoes.
6. Add chopped eggs, celery, shallots, green pepper, and pickle relish.
7. Mix thoroughly.
8. Cover and refrigerate overnight to blend in flavors.
